error.invalid_device: The device at the given address is not an AquaLogic panel

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of your AquaLogic controller
data_description.port: TCP port used to connect to the AquaLogic controller

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.description: Configuring {integration_title} via YAML is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. While importing your YAML configuration, the AquaLogic device could not be reached or did not respond as an AquaLogic panel. Please ensure the device is accessible and restart Home Assistant to retry, or remove the {domain} key from your configuration and set up the integration via the UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.title: The {integration_title} YAML configuration is being removed
